text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, after Sakura Bakushin O has a number
of victories under her belt...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm in my office sifting through some files when
the hot spring coupon Sakura Bakushin O got
from the raffle happen to slip out. That reminds
me—

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Should there come a time in society where class
representatives are made obsolete by their
exceedingly exemplary status, then I'll visit the
hot springs.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...I couldn't make much sense of those words back
then, but with the expiry date fast approaching, I
decide to at least give them to Sakura Bakushin
O.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: That was my intention at least...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I see... So the time has finally come!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
It is true that as of late society has changed for
the better! Well, things have quieted down at
least.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
To give you an example, I've noticed I spend all
my lesson time sitting in complete silence!
choice_data_list: (Weren't you just asleep for most of it?)

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
In conclusion! Let us head to the hot spring with
Bakushin haste!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Whoa! This hot spring inn is simply magnificent!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Swept up by her Bakushin-like vigor, I find myself
standing outside the inn with only the clothes I'm
wearing.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
This is what an inn should be, how exemplary!
What a refined taste! It's fit for a class
representative!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: All right, Trainer, let's head inside right away!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
First splash water over yourself to warm up. Once
you're clean, then you can go in!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Make sure to follow the rules! That's the trick to
enjoying your time here!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Soaking in the hot spring...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Phew... The water was wonderful!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I feel shiny from head to toe! Hey, don't you think
I'm glowing after my dip?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I knew it! Looks like going to the hot springs
really does have a super Bakushin effect on your
skin.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
If I'm this smooth, surely it has an effect on my
speed?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
This calls for an experiment! Hm... Where else can
you find speed at the hot springs—

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: A game of table tennis! Trainer, I'm taking you on!
choice_data_list: But we just got out of the bath?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
No problem! You don't have to worry about
working up a sweat here!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Let's get in a long workout and then take another
good soak!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I make the most of the inn's facilities with Sakura
Bakushin O.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Phew... I may be a perfect class representative in
every regard, but this certainly has worn me out.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I don't think I've had this much fun since the time
I first decided to become class representative...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
When a trip has activities like this, who better for
the job than a class representative!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I put some extra oomph in my running today,
even more than I do for my class representative
duties...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
It's nice to relax and let my hair down once in a
while.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
However, a world that has no use for class
representatives is like a solar eclipse.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
The time when the sun, or the class
representative, is hidden is exceedingly short.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Soon enough I will return to my post. I must
remain exemplary at all times for that very
purpose!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I'll walk out of this hot spring glossy and smooth,
and make my comeback as a new, powered-up
class representative!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Thanks!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I'd like that to happen, but...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
In order to guide my classmates down the right
path, I must understand their feelings... Such as
why they like to goof around so much...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
That's why the most exemplary course of action
would be to hang out with you more!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: R-right?
choice_data_list: Yes, let's have some more fun!
Yes, let's have some more fun!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Okay! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I continue to enjoy my time at the inn together
with a very rambunctious Sakura Bakushin O.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I sense that Sakura Bakushin O and I have formed
an irreplaceable bond during this time together.
